generic_rules: Focus repairs on fixing AGREE syntax errors reported by the validator.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
Ensure AGREE type declarations (int, real, bool) are correct.
Repair contracts within the `annex agree { ... };` block.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` or `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts.
Define helper variables with `eq name : type = expression;`.
Declare constants with `const name : type = value;`.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on contract adjustments.
Avoid using unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Do not attempt to repair contracts outside of the `annex agree` block.
